seoTitle: Colo Heights vs Colongra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Colo Heights and Colongra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Colo Heights vs Colongra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Colo Heights and Colongra.
heading: Colo Heights vs Colongra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Colo Heights, New South Wales and Colongra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Colo Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Colongra (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Colo Heights or Colongra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Colo Heights has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Colongra scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Colo Heights scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Colongra scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Colo Heights or Colongra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Colo Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
